_comment: Romestead Dedicated Server Egg for Pterodactyl
name: Romestead
author: Kai S. Effelsberg
description: Romestead Dedicated Server (.NET 8, Steam App ID: 4763510). Requires a Steam account that owns the game.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Romestead Installation Script
# Steam App ID: 4763510
# IMPORTANT: Steam Guard MUST be disabled for this account!
# Set STEAM_USERNAME and STEAM_PASSWORD in the Startup tab before installing.

apt -y update
apt -y --no-install-recommends install curl lib32gcc-s1 ca-certificates openssl libicu-dev wget

# Configure Microsoft package repository for .NET 8
wget https://packages.microsoft.com/config/debian/11/packages-microsoft-prod.deb -O packages-microsoft-prod.deb
dpkg -i packages-microsoft-prod.deb
rm packages-microsoft-prod.deb
apt -y update

# Install .NET 8 Runtime and copy to server directory
apt -y install dotnet-runtime-8.0
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.dotnet
cp -r /usr/share/dotnet/* /mnt/server/.dotnet/

# Copy required libraries into server directory for runtime container
mkdir -p /mnt/server/lib
cp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libicu*.so* /mnt/server/lib/ 2>/dev/null || true
cp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libstdc++.so* /mnt/server/lib/ 2>/dev/null || true
cp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgcc_s.so* /mnt/server/lib/ 2>/dev/null || true

# Install SteamCMD
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
rm -rf steamcmd.tar.gz

# SteamCMD requires 32-bit libraries
dpkg --add-architecture i386
apt -y update
apt -y install lib32gcc-s1

# Ensure server directory is writable
mkdir -p /mnt/server
chmod -R 777 /mnt/server || true
rm -f /mnt/server/appmanifest_4763510.acf 2>/dev/null || true

# Run SteamCMD and download the server
# NOTE: You MUST provide STEAM_USERNAME and STEAM_PASSWORD that owns Romestead
if [ -z "$STEAM_USERNAME" ] || [ -z "$STEAM_PASSWORD" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: STEAM_USERNAME and STEAM_PASSWORD must be set. Romestead requires a Steam account that owns the game."
    exit 1
fi

export HOME=/mnt/server
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login "$STEAM_USERNAME" "$STEAM_PASSWORD" +app_update 4763510 validate +quit

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "ERROR: SteamCMD failed to install Romestead."
    exit 1
fi

# Create startup script that reads env vars and generates config.json
cat > /mnt/server/start.sh << 'SCRIPTEND'
#!/bin/bash
cd /home/container
rm -f /home/container/config.json
printf '{"AutoStartWorldName":"%s","AutoCreateAndLoadWorld":%s,"AutoCreateWorldSize":%s,"AutoCreateWorldSeed":%s,"Password":"%s","Port":%s,"MaxPlayers":%s,"EnableCheats":%s}\n' "$WORLD_NAME" "$AUTOCREATE_WORLD" "$WORLD_SIZE" "$WORLD_SEED" "$GAME_PASSWORD" "$GAME_PORT" "$MAX_PLAYERS" "$ENABLE_CHEATS" > /home/container/config.json
cat /home/container/config.json
export HOME=/home/container
export XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/home/container/.config
export XDG_DATA_HOME=/home/container/.local/share
mkdir -p /home/container/.config
mkdir -p /home/container/.local/share
mkdir -p /home/container/GameAnalytics
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/home/container/lib
# .NET GC tuning
export DOTNET_GCHighMemPercent=80
export DOTNET_GCServer=0
exec /home/container/.dotnet/dotnet Server.dll
SCRIPTEND
chmod +x /mnt/server/start.sh

echo "Romestead server installation completed."

variables.name: Steam Username
variables.description: Your Steam username (must own Romestead). Required for installation.

variables.name: Steam Password
variables.description: Your Steam password. Required for installation. Steam Guard must be disabled!

variables.name: Server Port
variables.description: The UDP port the server will listen on. Default: 8050

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: Optional password to protect the server.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players allowed. Default: 8

variables.name: World Name
variables.description: Name of the world to auto-start. Must not be empty (early EA builds crash with empty name).

variables.name: Auto Create And Load World
variables.description: Automatically create and load a world if AutoStartWorldName is empty. Default: true

variables.name: World Size
variables.description: Size of the auto-created world (1-3). Default: 1

variables.name: World Seed
variables.description: Seed for world generation. Use 'null' for random. Default: null

variables.name: Enable Cheats
variables.description: Enable cheats on the server. Default: false
